page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BISI632 or CBMG688F.

Formerly: CBMG688F.

BISI699 Special Problems in Biological Sciences (1-6 Credits) Independent study with a specific faculty instructor from the Biological Sciences Program (BISI). Often involves original research in a laboratory or computational setting.

Restriction: Must be in one of the concentration areas of the Biological Sciences Graduate Program (BISI).
